title: Villager Tower Mod
description: This mod includes custom items, blocks and crafting recipe. And most importantly adds a custom structure called villager tower that is similar to the pillager tower but with village theme loot.
body:
This mod adds:
- villager tower - similar to a pillager outpost but has village theme loot and is designed to look like a villager could live and work there
- pink garnet - creative only decorative item
- pink garnet block - creative only decorative block
- pink garnet ore - creative only decorative block
